title: Copy command doesn't work if a proxy requires a specific user-agent value

comments.body: Can I set custom `User-Agent` header somehow?

Thanks for your report.

I mean … change the server configuration? It makes no sense for Skopeo, by default, to pretend to be Docker or CRI-O, and there’s only so far it makes sense to add workarounds for any custom configuration anyone could ever create.

There isn’t currently a CLI option to change the user-agent header, and I’m not sure adding that feature is net beneficial (compare https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1212 ).
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
